Monthly membership $250/mo in-person · $225/mo remote. Scott Berlinger founder (former American Gladiator). Chelsea Piers facility. 40+ national championship titles. 4x USAT Team National Champion. Founded 2003. USAT Level 2. Sponsors: Pinarello, ROKA, Rudy Project.

Monthly subscription model. 150+ club members, 400+ athletes in programs/camps/clinics/yr. 14 coaches & ambassadors. 30+ sponsors. Founded 2010 by Alison Kreideweis & Jessica McDonald. Rated #1 Tri Club Northeast (Competitor.com). 2-week free trial, freeze/cancel.
